title: Ubiquiti UC-DAC-SFP+, UniFi SFP DAC Patch Cable, 0,5m, 10Gbps, white
category: Ubiquiti UC-DAC-SFP+, UniFi SFP DAC Patch Cable, 0,5m, 10Gbps, white
description: UC-DAC-SFP+ is a passive DAC cable 0.5m long for connect two SFP/SFP+ devices with a maximum throughput of 10Gbps. The cable is made in white color with a diameter of just 4.2mm and the wires inside the cable are type AWG30 GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
